title: astragalus pygmaeus
intro: Astragalus pygmaeus, also known as Pygmy Milkvetch, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family. It is native to the mountainous regions of China and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus pygmaeus include enhanced immune function, improved cardiovascular health, and reduced fatigue and stress levels. Herbal preparations of Astragalus pygmaeus include capsules, tablets, and teas, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
